basic_details.job_title: ICMR BMHRC Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR Bhopal Memorial Hospital & Research Centre
basic_details.short_information: ICMR Bhopal Memorial Hospital & Research Centre (ICMR BMHRC) has published the Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill Medical Officer position. Candidates up to 70 years of age holding an MBBS degree are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 20 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are provided below.

age_limit.details: Medical Officer: Maximum age limit is 70 years.

qualification.details: Medical Officer: A recognized Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) degree qualification included in the First Schedule or Second Scheduled or Part II of the Third Schedule (Other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (102 if 1956). Holders of educational qualifications included in Part II of the third Schedule should also fulfill the conditions specified in sub-section (3) of section 13 of the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (102 of 1956). Preference will be given to those candidates who have three or more years of experience.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ICMR BMHRC Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ICMR BMHRC Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICMR BMHRC Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Overview
ICMR BMHRC Medical Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICMR BMHRC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICMR BMHRC Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: A recognized Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) degree qualification included in the First Schedule or Second Scheduled or Part II of the Third Schedule (Other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (102 if 1956). Holders of educational qualifications included in Part II of the third Schedule should also fulfill the conditions specified in sub-section (3) of section 13 of the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (102 of 1956). Preference will be given to those candidates who have three or more years of experience.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: Maximum age limit is 70 years.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR BMHRC Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICMR BMHRC Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Medical Officer. This is a contractual position at ICMR BMHRC, Bhopal.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Medical Officer. The recruitment is being conducted through a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a recognized MBBS degree. Preference will be given to those with three or more years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Officer post is 70 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 590/- (non-refundable) for Unreserved, EWS & OBC categories. No fee is mentioned for other categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 20th July 2026. Candidates should report between 09:00 AM and 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at ICMR Bhopal Memorial Hospital & Research Centre, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, 462038.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and self-attested photocopies, including educational certificates, ID proof, and experience certificates if applicable.
